positive: A stylized, detailed illustration of a serene mystical forest creature, resembling a blend of a fox and a celestial deer, standing in a deep forest clearing. The creature has flowing iridescent fur, glowing ethereal antlers, and large, expressive sapphire eyes. The scene is composed with a deep central focus, featuring bioluminescent flora and gently cascading mist. The style is inspired by modern Nordic mythology illustration, incorporating high contrast silhouettes, jewel tones (deep emerald, sapphire blue, amethyst purple), and warm golden highlights. The artwork should be highly decorative, perfectly suited for apparel print, with clean outlines and flat graphic areas suitable for single-color line art adaptation. Composition must be symmetrical and contained within a central, impactful graphic area, designed to print beautifully on textiles, maximizing visual punch and clean edges.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, amateur drawing, noise, messy lines, gradients (unless described as iridescent), poor composition
